name: @studio/notify
description: Studio-internal OUTBOUND notification seam. Pushes a Telegram alert (via the studio's hosted [STUDIO_NOTIFICATIONS] n8n workflow) when a Claude Code session needs attention or finishes, and offers the same signed seam to other callers (e.g. ~/packages/audit). Studio OPS infra — NOT a client-template package: never enters a client repo, not tier-gated.
